hooks.command: powershell -NonInteractive -Command "$ctx = 'MEMORY SAVE REMINDER: Before finishing, check if anything new was learned this session (new IBSheet discoveries, bug patterns, deployment issues, user feedback/corrections, code decisions). If yes, update the relevant memory file at C:\\Users\\USER\\.claude\\projects\\D--MyProject-AIHelperCollector\\memory\\ or CLAUDE.md. If nothing new was learned, just say ok and finish.'; ($ctx | ConvertTo-Json) -replace '^\"|\"$', '' | Out-Null; Write-Output (@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='Stop';additionalContext=$ctx}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress); exit 2"
